title: HEALTH AND FITNESS - 211info
text: WEST SALEM BRANCH HEALTH AND FITNESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a variety of sports and fitness programs, including team sports such as basketball and soccer. Snacks, meals, and nutrition education are also provided. 925 Gerth Street NW Salem, OR 97304 Eligibility: Grades 1-12 Hours: Varies Email (503) 428-0285 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 428-0285 Main phone Main phone (503) 428-0285 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Membership fee is $25 annually. Sport fees varies by program. Financial assistance available. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Across from Walker Middle School Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Nutrition Education Team Sports/Leagues Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - BOYS & GIRLS CLUB If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
